name: Hamburger Muffins
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except bread.
2. Cut the crusts off very fresh bread slices.
3. Butter one side of each bread slice.
4. Line muffin tins with buttered sides down using the bread slices, ensuring no breakage at the bottom.
5. Fill each muffin cup with a good tablespoon of hamburger filling.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. These can be frozen and reheated or served cold. Use lean ground beef for best results.
